coverage_summary.important_caveat: Spotify's official songwriter page reports 371 songs written, but the public page only exposes the visible/top subset to this browsing session. This file is a verified/best-effort public-source list, not a complete royalty-society export.
coverage_summary.best_next_step_for_true_100_percent_comp: Export Eric Bellinger's works from a PRO/publisher source such as BMI/ASCAP/Songview, Spotify Songwriter internal catalog, TIDAL full credits, or MusicBrainz API/live data dump, then reconcile duplicate titles and alternate versions.

source_urls.apple_music_and_shazam_public_credits: Public Apple Music/Shazam credit pages surfaced in web results for selected tracks
